title: ACT Business Command
subtitle: EOFY decisions, founder money movement, R&D window logic, and 1 July operating readiness.
disclaimer: Scenario mechanics only. Standard Ledger, the R&D consultant, and the DGR lawyer own final tax, R&D, and legal positions.

metrics.label: Days to EOFY
metrics.detail: 30 Jun 2026 close. Pty target start is 1 Jul 2026.

metrics.label: P0 open
metrics.detail: Live from the Notion EOFY tracker.

metrics.label: Ben invoice route
metrics.detail: Phase 2 Knight Photography invoices to the sole trader, before the split Q4 window.

metrics.label: Nic drawings route
metrics.detail: Scenario cash movement from the sole trader, sized against collections.

metrics.label: R&D window refund
metrics.detail: 24 Apr to 30 Jun Pty window only, if associate amounts are paid by 30 Jun.

criticalPath.step: NAB docs and Pty account live
criticalPath.why: The Pty bank account gates seed loans, window payments, Xero, and 1 July trading readiness.
GST, PSI, Q4 split, Nic window fee, and paid-by-30-Jun rules must be written before invoices move.
Sets the claimant, payroll employer, contract counterparty, QBE handling, and novation wording.
Ben route is the only deductible founder-pay route out of the sole trader this year.
Funds the Pty window payments and creates clean founder loan accounts for later tax-free repayments.

criticalPath.step: Pty pays the R&D window amounts
criticalPath.why: Associate R&D amounts enter FY26 only if paid by 30 Jun; otherwise they carry into FY27.
If either family trust has FY26 income, resolutions are due by 30 Jun.
Neither 328-G (UEO) nor 122-A (100%) cleanly fits 50/50 two-family-trust ownership. SL picks the path; it also decides whether a tax-free credit director-loan is available.
Up to $30K concessional cap deducts at marginal rate, but the fund must RECEIVE it by 30 Jun (send ~23-25 Jun). Confirm cap headroom + Div 293 stack first.
The GST going-concern exemption fails if the recipient Pty is not GST-registered before the transfer/settlement.
Instant asset write-off + prepaid SaaS deduct at the sole-trader marginal rate (~47%), beating the Pty 25%. One-shot FY26 lever.
In-year founder draws against debit loan accounts need a written agreement (8.37% FY26 benchmark, MYR by 30 Jun) or they are deemed unfranked dividends.
Drives the QLD dutiable value, the director-loan account, and any CGT calc on the transfer.
Recharacterised salary + $120K-each Pty payroll may cross the ~$1.3M QLD grouped threshold (ACT Pty + future Harvest Pty).
Cessation-quarter BAS; cancel sole-trader ABN/GST/PAYGW only after this and all final obligations. Exact date TBC with SL (28 Jul / ~25 Aug / 28 Oct).
Hard 10-month deadline. Miss it and the entire FY26 R&D claim is forfeited (the same failure that cost FY24-25).

decisions.title: Operating entity (Decision 1)
decisions.decision: Leaning Option A: A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd trades directly as the single operating company, R&D claimant and payroll employer; interpose a holdco above later via Div 615. The 'Pty-becomes-holdco + new ACT Projects subsidiary' hive-down is rejected (forces a second contract/R&D/trading-name migration). Ratify in writing.
decisions.status: Leaning Option A - ratify in writing
decisions.why: Gates novation letters and payroll setup. Until ratified in writing, contracts cannot be re-papered to the correct entity.

decisions.title: Sole-trader → Pty transfer mechanism
decisions.decision: Proposed call: 328-G & 122-A fail on the 50/50 two-trust cap table → market-value SALE sheltered by the 50% CGT discount + Div 152, price left as a vendor loan (tax-free founder drawdown). This is a FORK from the journal-entry/Path-C model — SL must re-open it; consider a PBR on the credit-loan-not-Div-7A point.
decisions.why: Determines the CGT cost, the QLD duty exposure, and whether the founders get a tax-free loan. The #1 ruling.

decisions.title: Butterfly / DGR connection
decisions.decision: Confirm how The Butterfly Movement Ltd connects to the group without undermining DGR/PBI compliance or Indigenous-led governance.
decisions.why: The handover is live and the holdco ownership idea may not fit a company limited by guarantee.

decisions.title: Farm stays personal
decisions.decision: Keep the farm outside the core business entity for FY26 and document any future arm's-length lease separately.
decisions.why: Prevents Harvest, farm accommodation, and ACT Projects economics from being mashed together.

decisions.title: FY26 draw totals
decisions.decision: Set Ben/Nic after-tax founder cash targets before invoices, drawings, super contributions, and reserves move.
decisions.why: The $250K/$100K routing is tax mechanics, not a pay-parity verdict.

moneyRoutes.route: Knight Photography invoices to the sole trader, plus the genuine Pty window invoice for 24 Apr to 30 Jun work.
mechanics: Sole trader pays Phase 2 invoices 15079 and 15080 if Standard Ledger confirms the basis.
The Q4 invoice is split at 24 Apr because the Pty did not exist before then.
The Pty window invoice must be paid by 30 Jun to enter the FY26 associate R&D claim.
cautions: Confirm Knight Photography legal form and PSI posture.
Do not route service income through family trusts.

moneyRoutes.route: Sole trader drawings for cash, plus a small arm's-length Pty window fee if Standard Ledger sets one.
mechanics: Nic cannot invoice himself; sole trader cash movement is drawings.
Drawings do not create a new deduction or tax event because Nic is already taxed on the sole trader profit.
The Pty window fee can support the FY26 R&D claim only if paid by 30 Jun.
cautions: Size drawings against collected cash, not the full receivables list.
Keep director loans into the Pty documented separately.
Do not borrow from the Pty before the Div 7A framework is ready.

moneyRunSheet.from: Standard Ledger answers + current bank balances
requiredBeforeMove: Standard Ledger confirms cash-vs-accrual treatment for Nic's deduction.
Standard Ledger confirms Knight Photography legal form, GST, and PSI posture.
Ben and Nic set the after-tax target, not just the gross routing.
evidence: Current receivables and tax provision note

moneyRunSheet.to: Nicholas Marchesi sole trader and A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd
requiredBeforeMove: Invoice 15079 and 15080 treatment confirmed.
Q4 split at 24 Apr confirmed.
Window invoice counterparty confirmed as the Pty.
Collected cash checked against receivables.
Personal tax provision agreed.
Ben/Nic after-tax target agreed.

moneyRunSheet.move: Decide Pty seed and R&D window payment path
moneyRunSheet.to: A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd NAB account
requiredBeforeMove: Pty NAB account is live.
Loan note is signed.
Separate director loan accounts are opened.
Board minute and engagement letters are ready.

moneyRunSheet.to: Nicholas Marchesi sole trader and A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd
requiredBeforeMove: Monday invoice package marked green.
Invoice numbers and counterparties match the Standard Ledger answer.
No family trust service invoice is used.
evidence: Notion task linked to invoice files

moneyRunSheet.move: Sole trader pays approved Ben invoices
moneyRunSheet.from: Nicholas Marchesi sole trader operating account
requiredBeforeMove: Invoices are issued.
Sole trader cash can support payment after tax provisioning.
Standard Ledger confirms payment is the safe default for FY26 treatment.

moneyRunSheet.from: Nicholas Marchesi sole trader operating account
requiredBeforeMove: Drawings ceiling agreed Monday.
Tax provision has been separated.
Movement is recorded as drawings, not an invoice.

moneyRunSheet.move: Seed the Pty by director loan
moneyRunSheet.to: A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd NAB account
moneyRunSheet.status: Only if NAB and loan note are live
requiredBeforeMove: NAB account is live.
Loan note is signed.
Founder loan accounts are set up separately.
Shareholders Agreement imbalance handling is noted if only one founder seeds.

moneyRunSheet.from: A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd NAB account
requiredBeforeMove: Pty is funded by documented director loan.
Ben window invoice is issued to the Pty.
Nic arm's-length window figure is set by Standard Ledger.
Associate paid-by-30-Jun rule is confirmed.

moneyRunSheet.to: Notion EOFY tracker and evidence pack
requiredBeforeMove: Every actual transfer has a matching invoice, note, or signed paper.
No row is marked actualised without evidence.

timeline.label: Pre-Pty work
timeline.note: Cannot be claimed by the Pty under the locked Path C mechanics.

timeline.label: Claimable window
timeline.note: Founder amounts need engagement papers, evidence, arm's-length pricing, and payment by 30 Jun.

timeline.label: Full-year setup
timeline.note: Payroll, project coding, receipts, and R&D capture start in the claimant from day one.

nodes.label: A Curious Tractor Pty Ltd
nodes.role: Registered 24 Apr 2026, owned by the two family trusts
nodes.status: Primary structure unless Decision 1 changes it

nodes.label: Holdco (later, via Div 615)
nodes.role: Optional holding company interposed ABOVE the Pty later if a raise/sale needs it. The 'operating subsidiary' hive-down is rejected.

nodes.label: Harvest entity
nodes.role: Standalone venue, cafe, garden, events, and workshop economics

nodes.label: The Butterfly Movement Ltd
nodes.role: Existing DGR/PBI charity for Goods on Country philanthropic capital

nodes.label: Farm / Witta land
nodes.role: Personal or trust-held land, separate from Harvest trading
